open_gaps.SEC-002: LOW, unchanged. viewer.js loadDocument() still imposes no numPages>1000 cap at the load boundary; merge.js addFiles() has no cumulative-bytes/page cap. Client-side-only DoS (uploader's own tab) on the 1.6 GiB box. Developer task — fix once at the viewer load boundary to cover all per-page consumers. New per-page consumers text-extract.js (getTextContent loop) and bg-borders.js (embedPage loop) inherit the same unbounded-page exposure but add no new server-side risk.

notes: 33 JS modules (+2 since last review). Reviewed both new modules: text-extract.js (read-only; pdf.js getTextContent per page with page.cleanup() on the small-RAM box; extracted text reaches the DOM only via readonly <textarea>.value + textContent, download blob is text/plain; filename whitelisted to [A-Za-z0-9._-] and length-capped 180; no-text guard prevents empty download; blob URL revoked; no innerHTML/eval/external request — XSS-safe) and bg-borders.js (pdf-lib embedPage rebuild onto a fresh doc from doc.getData(); fixed BG_PRESETS list + <input type=color> parsed via strict /^#?[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/ regex; numeric inputs clamped width 0-24 / inset 0-200 with per-page inset cap so the frame can never invert; empty-op guard (no bg + width 0); filename whitelisted [A-Za-z0-9._-]; blob URL revoked; page count + dimensions preserved; no innerHTML/eval/external request — XSS-safe). Full-JS audit: zero non-empty user-data innerHTML assignments (all innerHTML hits are comments or `=''` DOM-clears), zero eval/Function/document.write, zero external fetch/XHR/remote script src across all 33 modules. upload.js still enforces ext+MIME+empty+size(50MB)+%PDF- magic, filenames sanitized. Live headers verified: full resource CSP, X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff; .mjs served text/javascript with nosniff. Path blocking: .git/config + CLAUDE.md + scripts/*.sh all 403, traversal 404, js/app.js 200, site 200. No hardcoded secrets in js/; the sole git-history 'PRIVATE KEY' grep hit is this status file's own prior note text (false positive), no actual key. No failed/invalid SSH auth in last 24h. Disk 44% used, 7.9G free. Stability gate OPEN (0 SYSTEM CRITICAL, 0 FAILED, 0 DONE-unverified).
